arts.ttl: Back in England, Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany looking to spoil Aston Villa’s party
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany spent last season at the helm of Burnley in the Premier League, so he knows how much Aston Villa ’s return to Champions League means to the club. But I know the stadium, the team and the coach very well - so it’s important that we go into this game tomorrow with full courage.”

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Serge Gnabry thriving under Vincent Kompany ahead of Aston Villa showdown
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Serge Gnabry knows his squad will face a challenge from Aston Villa in the Champions League, but also feels as if Vincent Kompany has the Bavarians ready. Our game is very good right now, very dominant.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa’s Unai Emery knows Bayern Munich present stiff challenge in Champions League
arts.sum: Of course we’re already playing teams like that in the Premier League - Manchester City, Liverpool, Arsenal, who are also favourites like Bayern Munich,” said Emery (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ). Aston Villa coach Unai Emery is no stranger to Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: Max Eberl relishing Bayern Munich’s tough away trip at Aston Villa
arts.sum: There’s probably room for a Peaky Blinders reference here, but Bayern Munich have a tough test coming up in Birmingham, England this week in the form of a trip to face Aston Villa in the Champions League . Ironically enough, both sides are also coming off of domestic league draws; Bayern having drawn 1-1 with Bayer Leverkusen and Villa having drawn 2-2 with Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa danger man identified ahead of huge Bayern Munich Champions League clash
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa and Bayern Munich star Alan McInally is expecting forward Morgan Rogers to be a handful when the two sides meet in the Champions League on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Harry Kane eager for huge atmosphere at Aston Villa
arts.sum: When asked if he thought Bayern Munich would look past Aston Villa, Kane dismissed the notion. Bayern Munich star striker Harry Kane saw his health in doubt ahead of the team’s Champions League match vs.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany makes Aston Villa and Bayer Leverkusen comparison ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany said it feels like a fortnight ago that they played against Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen because he has prepared so thoroughly for the Champions League clash against Aston Villa. Under new boss Kompany, Bayern have won six of their first seven games in all competitions this season and have scored a total of 30 goals.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane faces late fitness test as Bayern Munich prepare for Aston Villa game
arts.sum: Kane suffered an ankle injury during Bayern’s Bundesliga draw with German champions Bayer Leverkusen on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Bayern Munich injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Aston Villa and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery vows to stick to his guns ahead of Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery is preparing for a Champions League clash against German giants Bayern Munich on Tuesday, but has vowed he will not change his ways ahead of the match
